title: Hanto Mountains
content:
{{Top|leg}}
The '''Hanto Mountains''' were a mountain range on [[Sulon/Legends|Sulon]]. Two tall jagged peaks that seemed close together were referred to as "the twins".<ref name="RA">''[[Dark Forces: Rebel Agent]]''</ref>

They separated a continental semi-arid region of the planet that included [[Nefra Canyons]], from the farmed regions that included [[Barons Hed]] and [[Fuel City]].<ref name="RA" />

While the ''[[Moldy Crow/Legends|Moldy Crow]]'' was fleeing from the Fuel City, [[Kyle Katarn]] advised [[Jan Ors]] to retreat to the Nefra Canyons in order to lose the pursuing [[TIE/ln space superiority starfighter/Legends|TIE/LN starfighters]]. While approaching the Mountains, the ''Crow'' rolled and passed between the twins, followed by one TIE, but the one following scrapped a side of a peak, exploded, and caused an avalanche that reached the base of the mountain.<ref name="RA" />

==Appearances==
*''[[Dark Forces: Rebel Agent]]''

==Sources==
*<!-- 2008-12-09 -->''[[The Complete Star Wars Encyclopedia]]''
